output.explanation: Col 14 has a misspelling (“heart attaxk” → “heart attack”), while Col 15 indicates the domain “ami-*” (heart attack). The domain label should match the intended measure category; misspelling can invalidate the dependency mapping.

Col 15 is not a valid subtype code for its stated domain “heart failure” in Col 14. Other heart-failure codes follow pattern “hf-*” (e.g., hf-1, hf-2, hf-3, hf-4), but “axi-4” belongs to heart attack (ami-*) family (syntactically mismatched prefix).
